benchmark_metadata.title: Metagenomics gene-catalog pipeline in Galaxy
benchmark_metadata.benchmark_goal: Measure whether an agent can infer, plan, and execute an appropriate Galaxy metagenomics pipeline for the same real-world task when the user prompt is low-context, medium-context, or high-context.

canonical_task_interpretation.expected_execution_scope: all execution steps after planning occur in Galaxy only

low_context: Infer that the task is a metagenomics assembly and annotation workflow.
Choose a suitable Galaxy metagenomics pipeline path.
Report the assembly tool, functional annotation tool, and pipeline step count.
medium_context: Respect the full gene-catalog analysis framing.
Choose a justified Galaxy metagenomics workflow and execute it correctly.
Report the correct assembly tool, functional annotation tool, and pipeline step count.
high_context: Use MEGAHIT for assembly in the final selected run.
Use eggNOG for functional annotation in the final selected run.
Report the correct assembly tool, functional annotation tool, and pipeline step count.

deterministic_checks.description: Execution after planning occurred only in Galaxy.
The run record shows Galaxy-native planning resources were checked.
The reported functional annotation tool is eggNOG.
The reported assembly tool is MEGAHIT.
The reported number of pipeline steps is 41.

benchmark_gaps_covered: workflow selection for complex metagenomics tasks
end-to-end execution of long Galaxy pipelines
correct extraction of tool identity and structural pipeline properties
